issues.description: TrashFromHand action uses legacy alias 'TrashFromHand' which is correct per schema, but the conditional structure suggests this is optional ('You may trash'). The thenActions should be wrapped in a condition or the action should use optional:true to reflect the optional nature of the trash.
filter object is empty; should specify count:1 to indicate 'up to 1 card from hand' if this is meant to be explicit.
